2311.reason: [The error uses Token::tokenList[Token::tokenIndex - 1].lineNum instead of the passed parameter lineNum, which may cause the wrong line number to be output when the token index is not properly synchronized or when the error occurs at the beginning of parsing.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The error uses Token::tokenList[Token::tokenIndex - 1].lineNum instead of the passed parameter lineNum, which may cause the wrong line number to be output when the token index is not properly synchronized or when the error occurs at the beginning of parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  The function ignores the passed 'lineNum' parameter and incorrectly uses the line number of the previous token, which may be out of bounds (if index is 0) or incorrect for the current syntax error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [When tokenIndex is 0, tokenIndex - 1 evaluates to -1, causing out-of-bounds access on std::vector]

2012.reason: [According to the problem description, for error type 'i' (missing semicolon), the error line number should correspond to the line where the last non-terminal before the semicolon is located, not the current token's line number. The current implementation uses the wrong line number for error reporting.]
